final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tri-fold travel brochure for a 4-day, 3-night Hangzhou self-guided itinerary.

Style/medium: needs a "travel-attack-card" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Japanese 攻略本 (strategy-guide print tradition), Lonely Planet illustrated city brochures, 1990s Hong Kong tourism foldouts; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be tri-fold layout with real Hangzhou map as central spine, 4 day-panels divided clearly
Subject: must include all 28 spots across 4 day-panels:
  Day 1: 断桥残雪 / 白堤 / 孤山 / 曲院风荷 / 苏堤春晓 / 花港观鱼 / 雷峰塔 / 柳浪闻莺
  Day 2: 灵隐寺 / 飞来峰 / 法喜寺 / 宋城
  Day 3: 九溪十八涧 / 龙井村 / 十里琅珰 / 云栖竹径
  Day 4: 拱宸桥 / 桥西历史街区 / 小河直街 / 大兜路 / 香积寺 / 西溪湿地 / 周家村 / 深潭口
Scene/backdrop: must be a real Hangzhou map base with all routes connecting day-panels
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include paper cardstock cutouts with floating shadow under each landmark
Text (verbatim): must include itinerary copy on each panel — 景点名 / 路线 / 餐厅 / 价格 / 交通 / 住宿 as specified in query
Constraints: must preserve real geographic accuracy of Hangzhou, 4 day-panels visible, all景点 preserved, tri-fold structure
Avoid:
